nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, SUM(em.marks_awarded) AS total_evaluation_marks, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT akr.question_id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.preparer_id) AS num_preparers, ak.status AS approval_status, au.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM question_paper qp JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = qp.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id JOIN question q ON q.id = em.question_id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id JOIN answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = akp.preparer_id WHERE qp.status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY qp.title, ak.status, au.display_name
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_key_preparer.preparer_id, answer_key_preparer.preparer_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
